title: Hi-Res AI-Realism
description: I made a Realistic Texturepack with the help of AI. This is the upscaled version.
body:
I've started a new project, making a realistic-looking texture pack.

All textures were made using AI, though some needed editing.

This is an upscaled 1024x version of the original.

![Collage of textures](https://i.imgur.com/0Ha5BcF.png)

![Comparison between original and upscaled](https://i.imgur.com/iltcUTY.png)

![Image of original texturepack in use](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74297287e49dae5ef4350012c6d745e379b84dca.png)

Version 2 includes:

- Grass Block
- Dirt
- Stone
- Sand
- Oak Log
- Birch Log
- Oak Leaves
- Birch Leaves
- Diamond Ore
- Copper Ore
- Diamond Block
- Barrel
- All wool colors
- Andesite
- Granite
- Diorite
- Bricks
- Grass
- Added all ore texture(also Deepslate and Nether ores)
- Added Iron, Gold, Lapis, Emerald block
- Bone Block top and side
- Deepslate top and side
- Netherrack
- Sandstone
- Added Clay Texture
- Added Oak Log Top Texture
- Improved Grass Block Texture
- Improved Dirt Texture
- Improved Oak Log Texture
- Added Water Texture
